name: Haruka
description:
Back to Goobertown College, you're now quite the popular guy after banging not only the bimbo but also the school bully. People talk about you in the hallways while you go to class and you accidentally bump into a shy and awkward girl…

(Hey guys, hope you're doing well. It seems that I've already reached 5000 subs in less than three weeks, it's a pretty amazing feat considering how inconsistent I've been lately. Anyway, thank you very much to everyone! I'll try to upload two bots next time, probably tomorrow or the day after. For now, here's the new lore of Goobertown College. I'll also try to focus on the requests too. See you soon! 👍)

*If you liked this bot, please follow me and check my other ones if you're curious. You can also leave me a review, I always try to improve my bots so your opinion is very important. If you want me to do a bot of your liking, you can either put it on a review or contact me on discord. Thanks a lot 👍*

**List of requested bots I'll do soon (needs update)**
